mapper.insert: INSERT INTO account (id, merchant_id, account_type, asset_code, status, metadata, created_at) VALUES (#{id}, #{merchantId}, #{accountType}, #{assetCode}, #{status}, COALESCE(#{metadata}::jsonb, '{}'::jsonb), #{createdAt})
mapper.select: SELECT id, merchant_id AS "merchantId", account_type AS "accountType", asset_code AS "assetCode", status, metadata::text AS metadata, created_at AS "createdAt" FROM account WHERE id = #{id}

SELECT id, merchant_id AS "merchantId", account_type AS "accountType", asset_code AS "assetCode", status, metadata::text AS metadata, created_at AS "createdAt" FROM account WHERE merchant_id = #{merchantId} AND account_type = #{type} AND asset_code = #{asset}

SELECT id, merchant_id AS "merchantId", account_type AS "accountType", asset_code AS "assetCode", status, metadata::text AS metadata, created_at AS "createdAt" FROM account WHERE id = #{id} FOR UPDATE
SELECT COALESCE( (SELECT balance_after FROM ledger_entry WHERE account_id = #{id} ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1), 0 )
